quote: I've done a fair share of traveling, but this trip with Guiding Winds stands out. Island hopping on the catamaran was the highlight of my year - the views were incredible and the fishing was top-notch. Dodie and Clint are the real deal; they handle all the details so you can just enjoy the gorgeous scenery. A truly first-class experience.
author: Frank Zuckero
photoAlt: Frank Zuckero throwing peace signs from a beachside porch in the BVI at sunset
